creator: kristinacors
caption: Did you know paying your mortgage could help you earn points for free travel?! Watch until the end for all the details! #travelhacks #traveltipsandhacks #travelseries #creditcardpoints #creditcardpointsandmiles

transcription.text: What if you could travel for free just by paying your mortgage? Well you can with the Built credit card. With Built you can actually earn points on your mortgage without a fee when you pay through the Built app. You'll also earn points on everyday spending like dining and travel. Then you can redeem those points for free flights or hotel stays.
